title: habenaria cruciata
intro: Habenaria cruciata, also known as the cross-leaved orchid, is a species of orchid native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of this plant are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Habenaria cruciata is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, although it has also been used in some herbal remedies as a tincture or dried powder.
